customAttributes.description:
T: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.

When purchasing this unique product, please keep in mind that this card only appears in the Secret Lair Commander Deck: Everyone’s Invited! - Double Rainbow Foil Edition and will ship out to you after the seller receives the product directly from Wizards of the Coast.The estimated time frame for sellers to receive stock is not fixed, so it could be anywhere between 1 - 10 weeks for delivery.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item. The estimated shipping time frame for this product varies as sellers receive this product(s) directly from Wizards of the Coast after 05/23/2025 during a 1-10 week timeframe.
customAttributes.flavorText: It started as a mere drop of water. The Magic Mirror crystallized it into much more.
